caption: The video presents a presentation slide deck with a person visible in a small inset video window at the top right. The first two frames show a slide with the logos for "fluentbit" and "OpenTelemetry" separated by a plus sign. Below the logos, text reads "OpenTelemetry: incubating CNCF project," followed by bullet points stating "Standard SDKs and Specs for creating metrics/traces" and "Primary focus is tracing & metrics, log standard was recently created." The scene transitions to a "Q & A" slide in the final two frames. This slide displays the websites "fluentd.org" and "fluentbit.io," alongside the GitHub handle "fluent/." Two stylized bird logos, one blue and one green, appear at the bottom of the screen. Throughout all frames, a person wearing a light-colored shirt is visible in the small inset window, appearing to speak to the audience.
